description: Lightweight Pack Runtime SDK for installed/enabled pack registry access, pack installation lifecycle, rollback, and frontend shell synchronization without importing the full platform client.
principles: Expose Pack Runtime as the stable integration surface for external frontends, plugins, CLIs, sidecars, and automation scripts.
Keep optional capabilities discoverable through the backend pack registry instead of hard-coding every feature into the main system.
Let frontend shells synchronize menus, routes, UI resources, and SDK entrypoints from enabled packs while preserving enable, disable, and rollback controls.

capabilities.name: list
capabilities.description: Read installed packs with enabled-pack summary for operator consoles.

capabilities.name: installed
capabilities.description: Read the local installed pack registry.

capabilities.name: enabled
capabilities.description: Read enabled packs that should contribute frontend menus, routes, UI assets, and SDK entrypoints.

capabilities.name: backendModules
capabilities.description: Inspect backend pack modules and routes mounted in the host Gateway.

capabilities.name: install
capabilities.description: Install a pack from a local manifest path or manifest URL.

capabilities.name: enable
capabilities.description: Enable an installed pack and make its backend/frontend capabilities active.

capabilities.name: disable
capabilities.description: Disable an installed pack without deleting it from the local registry.

capabilities.name: rollback
capabilities.description: Rollback an installed pack to its previous version metadata when available.

capabilities.name: frontendSync
capabilities.description: Build frontend shell menus and routes from enabled pack manifests.
